mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(case when status = 'withdrawable' and direction = 'positive' then rebate_amount else 0 end), 0) as withdrawableAmount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'in_review' and direction = 'positive' then rebate_amount else 0 end), 0) as reviewingAmount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'paid' and direction = 'positive' then rebate_amount else 0 end), 0) as paidAmount, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'rolled_back' then abs(rebate_amount) when status = 'negative' then abs(rebate_amount) else 0 end), 0) as rolledBackAmount from jst_rebate_ledger where channel_id = #{channelId} and del_flag = '0'
select * from jst_rebate_ledger where channel_id = #{channelId} and direction = 'negative' and settlement_id is null and del_flag = '0' order by create_time asc, ledger_id asc
select * from jst_rebate_ledger where channel_id = #{channelId} and direction = 'negative' and settlement_id is null and del_flag = '0' order by create_time asc, ledger_id asc for update

select rl.ledger_id, rl.order_id, om.order_no, rl.contest_id, rl.rebate_amount, rl.direction, rl.status, rl.settlement_id, rl.accrual_time, rl.create_time from jst_rebate_ledger rl left join jst_order_main om on om.order_id = rl.order_id and om.del_flag = '0' where rl.settlement_id = #{settlementId} and rl.del_flag = '0' order by rl.ledger_id asc
